hooks.comment: Matcher-less (broad) hook — the guard script self-filters by inspecting tool_input.command from stdin and only acts on git commit/push/merge/rebase. Exit 2 = block. Reuses .claude/hooks/guard-protected-branch.sh without duplicating logic, so Codex sees the same main/dev protection as Claude Code.

hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== gongsiri 협업 규칙 요약 ==="; echo "브랜치: feature/<owner>-<scope> | PR → dev | Conventional Commit"; echo "규칙 전문: docs/rules/code-style.md · version-control.md · change-management.md"; echo "main/dev 직접 commit/push/merge 금지"'
hooks.comment: SessionStart: inject docs/rules/ summary into Codex session context at open. Prints a compact pointer to the canonical docs rather than re-reading every rule file (cost). Gives Codex the same rule awareness as Claude Code's AGENTS.md.
